nasb.text: a messenger came to Job and said, “The oxen were plowing and the donkeys feeding beside them,

esv.text: and there came a messenger to Job and said, “The oxen were plowing and the donkeys feeding beside them,

cnv.text: 有報信的來見約伯，說：“牛正在耕田，母驢在附近吃草的時候，

ccb.text: 有报信的人来对约伯说：“牛正在耕田、驴正在旁边吃草的时候，
